name: Virtual part can be added as a BOM sub-component in an assembly
steps:
Given a part 'Labor Hour' is marked as Virtual
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' is marked as Assembly and has an editable BOM
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the BOM tab of 'PCB Assembly'
When the user clicks 'Add BOM Item' and selects 'Labor Hour' as the sub-component with quantity 2
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the BOM for 'PCB Assembly' displays 'Labor Hour' as a sub-component with quantity 2
